command: echo '=== Copying .ex5 to correct location ===' && cp '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Experts/PropFirmBot.ex5' '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Experts/PropFirmBot/PropFirmBot.ex5' && ls -la '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Experts/PropFirmBot/PropFirmBot.ex5' && echo '=== Restarting MT5 ===' && export DISPLAY=:99 && export WINEPREFIX=/root/.wine && export WINEDEBUG=-all && killall -9 terminal64.exe 2>/dev/null; wineserver -k 2>/dev/null; sleep 5 && echo 'Starting MT5...' && cd '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5' && wine terminal64.exe & sleep 20 && echo '=== MT5 process ===' && ps aux | grep terminal64 | grep -v grep && echo '=== Check EA loaded ===' && cat '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Logs/20260226.log' 2>&1 | tr -d '\0' | tail -30 && TLOG=$(ls -t '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/logs/'*.log 2>/dev/null | head -1) && tail -10 "$TLOG" 2>&1 | tr -d '\0'
